emergency_definition: Complete power outage to a commercial building or facility
Live exposed wiring accessible to people
Electrical burning smell or sparks with unknown source
Generator failure at a hospital or data center
Anything where there is immediate risk of fire, injury, or critical system failure

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Collect caller information and send an alert

integration_constraints: No auto-creation of jobs for electrical emergencies
No creation of inspection scheduling requests in ServiceTrade or FieldEdge
questions_or_unknowns: Transfer retry logic not specified in demo.
How to handle non-emergency calls during office hours
notes: Hospitals, data centers, and airports have SLA agreements and are treated as priority emergencies
